q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.write_text(), a local filesystem write, not network I/O, shell execution, or RCE.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Cleartext sensitive data persists in the file on disk after the function returns, verifiable by reading the file.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: Returns only {'path': str(target)} — the file path — not the file contents or any indication of encryption status.
